phase-plan.purpose: Deliver a reusable in-app chat panel mounted in Space Explorer and backed by a Codex/OpenAI server route with feature-flag gating.
phase-plan.scope: Reusable UI component + API session route + Space Explorer mount. Out of scope: mutation execution (50-09), canonical asset workflows (50-10), and bundle serialization e2e (50-11/50-12).

file.description: Reusable authoring chat panel with context-aware request payloads and message history UI.
Server route for chat requests with feature-flag gating and Codex/OpenAI responses.
Mount reusable chat panel in Space Explorer and pass authoring context.

suggestion.gap: Requirements do not explicitly require reusable chat components across authoring surfaces.
suggestion.proposal: Add requirement: AI authoring chat UI must be implemented as reusable component(s), not surface-specific one-offs.
